channel.title: Dwell Time, a transit podcast
channel.description: Join Denis Agar and Rodney Chan in their discussions around transit in Canada. From buses to trains and everything else transit, learn about advocacy happening in Canadian cities and beyond.
channel.itunes:author: Dwell Time Productions
channel.itunes:summary: Join Denis Agar and Rodney Chan in their discussions around transit in Canada. From buses to trains and everything else transit, learn about advocacy happening in Canadian cities and beyond.

item.title: Episode 3 - Talking Mexico, Halifax, and Eglinton Crosstown (with August)
item.itunes:title: Episode 3 - Talking Mexico, Halifax, and Eglinton Crosstown (with August)
item.itunes:summary:
While a Canadian did not make it on a round trip from Earth to the Moon just yet, the Eglinton Crosstown or simply "Line 5" did in fact finally open! Joined by August from TTC Riders, we discuss our first impressions and how monumental this is for the Greater Toronto Area.
Denis talks about his time travelling across warm and sunny Mexico while Rodney speaks about his simultaneous visit to Halifax, which admittedly was nowhere near as warm.
---
Learn more about August! https://bsky.app/profile/auguststreet.ca https://www.auguststreet.ca https://bsky.app/profile/ttcriders.bsky.social https://www.ttcriders.ca
Olivia Chow's Thread on signal priority https://www.threads.com/@mayoroliviachow/post/DVHTrvbEqzh?xmt=AQF0OQVPeUKbmxz3XcQnAIMwRXtrl8GEL8-9HZMayk6ZlA Canada Public Transit Fund cut by $5 billion https://environmentaldefence.ca/2026/02/02/statement-5-billion-in-transit-cuts-a-huge-step-backwards/ Halifax Transit Advocacy Group: It's More Than Buses https://morethanbuses.ca/ Activate Transit Windsor Essex https://activatetransitwindsoressex.ca/ HFX by Bike https://www.youtube.com/@hfxbybike Denis's Thread about Mexico https://bsky.app/profile/denisagar.bsky.social/post/3megqagnqis2a Jonathan English's report for CSA for the show notes: https://www.csagroup.org/article/public-policy/making-the-grade-recommendations-for-addressing-the-high-cost-of-canadas-transit-infrastructure/
item.itunes:author: Tamarack & Heather
item.description:
While a Canadian did not make it on a round trip from Earth to the Moon just yet, the Eglinton Crosstown or simply "Line 5" did in fact finally open! Joined by August from TTC Riders, we discuss our first impressions and how monumental this is for the Greater Toronto Area.

Denis talks about his time travelling across warm and sunny Mexico while Rodney speaks about his simultaneous visit to Halifax, which admittedly was nowhere near as warm.

---

item.content:encoded:
While a Canadian did not make it on a round trip from Earth to the Moon just yet, the Eglinton Crosstown or simply "Line 5" did in fact finally open! Joined by August from TTC Riders, we discuss our first impressions and how monumental this is for the Greater Toronto Area.

Denis talks about his time travelling across warm and sunny Mexico while Rodney speaks about his simultaneous visit to Halifax, which admittedly was nowhere near as warm.

---

Learn more about August!
https://bsky.app/profile/auguststreet.ca
https://www.auguststreet.ca
https://bsky.app/profile/ttcriders.bsky.social
https://www.ttcriders.ca

item.title: Episode 2 - Interview with Reece Martin
item.itunes:title: Episode 2 - Interview with Reece Martin
item.itunes:summary:
Nearly every city in the country that doesn't experience rain all winter has been inundated with so much snow and it has brought problems to transit riders especially in Southern Ontario.
We're also joined by our guest, Reece Martin of RMTransit, where we discuss the nuances and challenges of building a transit advocacy movement, culture, and education. Plus we also provide the big reveal: what is a "dwell time"?
--- Snow Clearing:
* Grand River Transit working to enhance bus stop snow removal times * https://www.cambridgetoday.ca/local-news/grand-river-transit-working-to-enhance-bus-stop-snow-removal-times-11765595?ref=tritag.ca * Toronto residents are frustrated with slush-filled sidewalks, city responds * https://nowtoronto.com/news/toronto-frustrated-slush-filled-sidewalks/
Vancouver Broadway Subway Bus Detour (Instagram Explainer) - https://www.instagram.com/reel/DUCNt3Oj794/?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&igsh=MzRlODBiNWFlZA==
RPA (Regional Plan Association for the Tri-State Area) Triboro Line/Interborough Express - https://rpa.org/work/campaigns/ibx
Rider's Alliance (NYC) - https://www.ridersalliance.org/
Transit Engineering & Planning: Needs and Perspectives in Canada - https://ojs.library.queensu.ca/index.php/PCEEA/article/view/19671
Reece Martin - https://reecemartin.ca
Bluesky - https://bsky.app/profile/dwelltime.ca
item.itunes:author: Tamarack & Heather
item.description:
Nearly every city in the country that doesn't experience rain all winter has been inundated with so much snow and it has brought problems to transit riders especially in Southern Ontario. 

We're also joined by our guest, Reece Martin of RMTransit, where we discuss the nuances and challenges of building a transit advocacy movement, culture, and education. Plus we also provide the big reveal: what is a "dwell time"?

---
Snow Clearing:

  • Grand River Transit working to enhance bus stop snow removal times
    • https://www.cambridgetoday.ca/local-news/grand-river-transit-working-to-enhance-bus-stop-snow-removal-times-11765595?ref=tritag.ca
  • Toronto residents are frustrated with slush-filled sidewalks, city responds
    • https://nowtoronto.com/news/toronto-frustrated-slush-filled-sidewalks/

Vancouver Broadway Subway Bus Detour (Instagram Explainer) - https://www.instagram.com/reel/DUCNt3Oj794/?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&igsh=MzRlODBiNWFlZA==

RPA (Regional Plan Association for the Tri-State Area) Triboro Line/Interborough Express - https://rpa.org/work/campaigns/ibx

Rider’s Alliance (NYC) - https://www.ridersalliance.org/

Transit Engineering & Planning: Needs and Perspectives in Canada - https://ojs.library.queensu.ca/index.php/PCEEA/article/view/19671

Reece Martin - https://reecemartin.ca

Bluesky - https://bsky.app/profile/dwelltime.ca
item.content:encoded:
Nearly every city in the country that doesn't experience rain all winter has been inundated with so much snow and it has brought problems to transit riders especially in Southern Ontario. 

We're also joined by our guest, Reece Martin of RMTransit, where we discuss the nuances and challenges of building a transit advocacy movement, culture, and education. Plus we also provide the big reveal: what is a "dwell time"?

---
Snow Clearing:

  • Grand River Transit working to enhance bus stop snow removal times
    • https://www.cambridgetoday.ca/local-news/grand-river-transit-working-to-enhance-bus-stop-snow-removal-times-11765595?ref=tritag.ca
  • Toronto residents are frustrated with slush-filled sidewalks, city responds
    • https://nowtoronto.com/news/toronto-frustrated-slush-filled-sidewalks/

Vancouver Broadway Subway Bus Detour (Instagram Explainer) - https://www.instagram.com/reel/DUCNt3Oj794/?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&igsh=MzRlODBiNWFlZA==

RPA (Regional Plan Association for the Tri-State Area) Triboro Line/Interborough Express - https://rpa.org/work/campaigns/ibx

Rider’s Alliance (NYC) - https://www.ridersalliance.org/

Transit Engineering & Planning: Needs and Perspectives in Canada - https://ojs.library.queensu.ca/index.php/PCEEA/article/view/19671

Reece Martin - https://reecemartin.ca

Bluesky - https://bsky.app/profile/dwelltime.ca

item.title: Episode 1 - Meet Rodney and Denis!
item.itunes:title: Episode 1 - Meet Rodney and Denis!
item.itunes:summary:
It's our first step! Rodney Chan of TriTAG and Denis Agar of Movement have come together to discuss transit advocacy in Canada. Rodney brings up the new Line 6 Finch West LRT that just opened in Toronto and how its shortcomings are bringing transit priority front and centre at city hall.
As well, Denis and Rodney have a conversation about how they ended up in the transit planning and urbanism scene plus how they both have contributed to being micro-celebrities on social media.
---
Denis promoting a new bus service for Metro Vancouver - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eltnLcyP8AU [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eltnLcyP8AU&pp=ygURZGVuaXMgdGhlIHBsYW5uZXI%3D] Steve Munro Blog Post on TTC Board discussion on Line 6 Finch West LRT - https://stevemunro.ca/2025/12/10/ttc-board-debates-finch-lrt/ Motion to speed up light rail transit and street cars - https://secure.toronto.ca/council/agenda-item.do?item=2025.MM35.15 Results of the motion - https://bsky.app/profile/graphicmatt.com/post/3ma4xkekyhk2o
Tri-Cities Transport Action Group (TriTAG) - https://tritag.ca Movement: Metro Vancouver Transit Riders - https://movementyvr.ca/
Bluesky - https://bsky.app/profile/dwelltime.ca
item.itunes:author: Tamarack & Heather
item.description:
It's our first step! Rodney Chan of TriTAG and Denis Agar of Movement have come together to discuss transit advocacy in Canada. Rodney brings up the new Line 6 Finch West LRT that just opened in Toronto and how its shortcomings are bringing transit priority front and centre at city hall. 

As well, Denis and Rodney have a conversation about how they ended up in the transit planning and urbanism scene plus how they both have contributed to being micro-celebrities on social media.

---

Denis promoting a new bus service for Metro Vancouver - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eltnLcyP8AU
Steve Munro Blog Post on TTC Board discussion on Line 6 Finch West LRT - https://stevemunro.ca/2025/12/10/ttc-board-debates-finch-lrt/
Motion to speed up light rail transit and street cars - https://secure.toronto.ca/council/agenda-item.do?item=2025.MM35.15
Results of the motion - https://bsky.app/profile/graphicmatt.com/post/3ma4xkekyhk2o

Tri-Cities Transport Action Group (TriTAG) - https://tritag.ca
Movement: Metro Vancouver Transit Riders - https://movementyvr.ca/

Bluesky - https://bsky.app/profile/dwelltime.ca
item.content:encoded:
It's our first step! Rodney Chan of TriTAG and Denis Agar of Movement have come together to discuss transit advocacy in Canada. Rodney brings up the new Line 6 Finch West LRT that just opened in Toronto and how its shortcomings are bringing transit priority front and centre at city hall. 

As well, Denis and Rodney have a conversation about how they ended up in the transit planning and urbanism scene plus how they both have contributed to being micro-celebrities on social media.

---

Denis promoting a new bus service for Metro Vancouver - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eltnLcyP8AU
Steve Munro Blog Post on TTC Board discussion on Line 6 Finch West LRT - https://stevemunro.ca/2025/12/10/ttc-board-debates-finch-lrt/
Motion to speed up light rail transit and street cars - https://secure.toronto.ca/council/agenda-item.do?item=2025.MM35.15
Results of the motion - https://bsky.app/profile/graphicmatt.com/post/3ma4xkekyhk2o

Tri-Cities Transport Action Group (TriTAG) - https://tritag.ca
Movement: Metro Vancouver Transit Riders - https://movementyvr.ca/

Bluesky - https://bsky.app/profile/dwelltime.ca
